summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 8 features: SPA navigation, optimistic cart updates, ProductCard add-to-cart feedback, metrics middleware distribution, and golden signals/CX metrics from real traffic. All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend features working correctly including Footer React Router Links, add-to-cart toast notifications, checkout flow, admin dashboard with Golden Signals and Customer Experience sections, and Auto-Heal tab with Enable/Alert-Heal toggles.

issues: Phone validation requires specific format (e.g., +1234567890) - validation message shown but could be clearer about expected format

passed_tests: SPA navigation between pages (Home → Products → Cart) - no full page reloads
Footer links navigate without full page reload (React Router Links)
Add to cart on product card shows success feedback (checkmark icon + toast notification)
Cart page shows items correctly after adding from product cards
Checkout flow works: add to cart → cart → checkout page loads
Admin login → dashboard → Overview tab shows Golden Signals section
Golden Signals section shows Latency/Traffic/Errors/Saturation with health scores
Admin dashboard Overview shows Customer Experience section
Customer Experience shows Apdex, P50/P95/P99, Availability, Error Budget
GET /api/metrics/golden-signals returns signals with health scores
GET /api/metrics/customer-experience returns Apdex, percentiles, availability, error budget
GET /api/metrics/real includes golden_signals and customer_experience fields
Metrics middleware distributes requests across all 5 nodes (API, Cache, DB, Queue, Backend)
Alert system fires on real traffic when thresholds breached (SRI critical alert shown)
Auto-Heal tab works with Enable/Disable and Alert-Heal toggles
Products listing page loads and shows product cards
Product detail page accessible via product card click
Generate Traffic and Start buttons work on dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.jsx correctly uses React Router <Link> components instead of <a href> tags for SPA navigation
CartContext.jsx implements optimistic updates with pendingOps ref to prevent race conditions
ProductCard.jsx has proper add-to-cart feedback with loading spinner, checkmark animation, and toast notification
MetricsMiddleware._classify_request distributes requests across all 5 nodes based on path patterns
Golden signals computed from real metrics with health scores (0-1 scale)
Customer experience metrics include industry-standard Apdex scoring (T=200ms threshold)
seed_data_creation: None - metrics are generated from real API interactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 features fully tested and working. Key changes: Footer uses React Router Link (no full page reloads), CartContext has optimistic updates with pendingOps tracking, ProductCard shows animated add-to-cart with toast. Backend MetricsMiddleware classifies requests to 5 nodes (API, Cache, DB, Queue, Backend) and triggers alert checks every 5 requests. Golden signals and CX metrics populated from real traffic. Dashboard shows real-time SRI trend, golden signals with health scores, and customer experience metrics. Auto-Heal tab has Enable/Alert-Heal toggles and SRI vs Golden Signals circular progress rings.

feature_verification.spa_navigation: Footer uses React Router Links - no full page reloads - WORKING
feature_verification.optimistic_cart: CartContext updates UI instantly before API confirms - WORKING
feature_verification.add_to_cart_feedback: ProductCard shows spinner → checkmark + toast notification - WORKING
feature_verification.metrics_middleware: Distributes across all 5 nodes (API, Cache, DB, Queue, Backend) - WORKING
feature_verification.golden_signals_api: GET /api/metrics/golden-signals returns 4 signals with health scores - WORKING
feature_verification.customer_experience_api: GET /api/metrics/customer-experience returns Apdex, percentiles, availability, error budget - WORKING
feature_verification.metrics_real_api: GET /api/metrics/real includes golden_signals and customer_experience - WORKING
feature_verification.alert_system: Fires alerts when thresholds breached (SRI critical shown) - WORKING
feature_verification.autoheal_tab: Enable/Disable and Alert-Heal toggles work - WORKING
feature_verification.products_page: Loads and shows product cards - WORKING
feature_verification.product_detail: Accessible via product card click - WORKING
